summary: Iteration 42 - Tested 2 UI changes: (1) Specialists page sort buttons, (2) User profile rating removal. All 9 required test cases passed.

features_tested.sort_buttons_visible: PASS - All 3 sort buttons found with correct data-testid: sort-default ('Výchozí'), sort-rating_desc ('★ Nejvyšší hodnocení'), sort-rating_asc ('★ Nejnižší hodnocení')
features_tested.sort_default_active_on_load: PASS - 'Výchozí' button has bg-bloom-mint class (active state) by default on page load
features_tested.sort_rating_desc_active: PASS - 'Nejvyšší hodnocení' button becomes active after click
features_tested.sort_desc_order_correct: PASS - After desc sort, 'TEST Dr. Jana Nováková' (5 stars) appears first; remaining 0-star specialists follow
features_tested.sort_rating_asc_active: PASS - 'Nejnižší hodnocení' button becomes active after click
features_tested.sort_asc_order_correct: PASS - After asc sort, 0-star specialists appear first
features_tested.sort_default_restores_order: PASS - Clicking 'Výchozí' restores original order correctly
features_tested.user_profile_no_ohodnotit_btn: PASS - 'Ohodnotit' button NOT present on user profile page (correctly removed)
features_tested.user_profile_send_message_visible: PASS - 'Napsat zprávu' button visible with data-testid=send-message-btn
features_tested.user_profile_report_user_visible: PASS - 'Nahlásit uživatele' button visible with data-testid=report-user-btn
features_tested.user_profile_no_avg_rating_display: PASS - No star rating display (0 filled pink stars) on user profile page of rated user (RateTarget2ynr53ff, avg_rating=5)
features_tested.user_profile_no_rating_text: PASS - No rating text patterns ('/ 5', 'hodnocení', 'Hodnocení od komunity') on profile page
features_tested.profile_form_no_avg_rating: PASS - Own ProfileForm page has no avg_rating display block

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users (RateTarget2ynr53ff with avg_rating=5 for profile rating removal test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42 tested 2 changes: (1) Specialists page client-side sort by rating with 3 buttons (Výchozí/Nejvyšší/Nejnižší), (2) User profile rating display removed. Both changes verified working. Login: page.fill + Enter. Data-testid: sort-default, sort-rating_desc, sort-rating_asc (sort buttons); send-message-btn, report-user-btn (user profile actions).
